data.title: US Private Sector Growth Remains Strong In October, Price Pressures Now Consistent With 'Inflation Running Below The Fed's 2% Target'
data.description: US private sector shows robust growth signals in October 2024, driven by strong services sector & slowing manufacturing. Inflation & business confidence on the rise post-election.

data.title: Northrop Grumman Reports Mixed Q3 Earnings: The Details
data.description: Northrop Grumman reported third-quarter revenue of $9.996 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $10.181 billion, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reported quarterly earnings of $7 per share, beating analyst estimates of $6.08 per share.

data.title: Lucid Capital Raise Should Be 'Zero Surprise To Anyone,' CEO Says
data.description: Shares of luxury EV maker Lucid dropped after the company announced a nearly $1.75 billion capital raise last week.

data.title: Dover's Q3 Earnings Miss Amid Soft Revenue Growth, Cuts 2024 Outlook
data.description: Dover Corporation reported Q3 results with revenue of $1.984B (1% Y/Y) and adjusted EPS of $2.27 (6% Y/Y). 2024 outlook lowered.

data.title: This Is What Whales Are Betting On Uber Technologies
